title: hieracium neocerinthe subsp. lamprophyllum
intro: Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. lamprophyllum, a lesser-known species of the dandelion family, is a flowering plant native to certain regions in Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium neocerinthe subsp. lamprophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support immune system health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including infusions and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
